message:
🐛 Fix OPA card not showing all clusters

The OPA card was filtering clusters based on browser health checks,
but the agent can reach clusters that browser-based API calls can't.

Changes:
- Remove healthy !== false filter that was hiding reachable clusters
- Add fallback fetch from agent /clusters endpoint
- Keep global and local cluster filters working correctly

Fixes issue where only local clusters (like kind-testing123) were shown
while remote clusters with OPA installed (vllm-d, platform-eval) were hidden.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
